tools.name: get_current_drought
tools.description:
Get current drought conditions from the US Drought Monitor.

    Returns the percentage of area at each drought intensity level:
    - None: No drought
    - D0: Abnormally Dry
    - D1: Moderate Drought
    - D2: Severe Drought
    - D3: Extreme Drought
    - D4: Exceptional Drought

    Provide ei

tools.name: get_drought_history
tools.description:
Get historical drought conditions over time from the US Drought Monitor.

    Returns weekly drought severity percentages for the specified area and date range.
    The Drought Monitor is updated every Tuesday, so data points are weekly.

    Args:
        state: Two-letter US state abbreviation (e.

tools.name: get_drought_summary
tools.description:
Get a national drought summary with total affected area percentages.

    Returns the current national overview showing what percentage of the US
    is experiencing each drought level (D0 through D4), plus the total area
    affected by any drought condition. Useful for getting a quick picture of
